Career opportunities

We're hiring!

Visit career opportunities for a list of all openings. You will be redirected to an external site. 

Executive Leadership Opportunity: Vice President, Operations
Lead operations across water, wastewater, natural gas, electricity, and telecom services for Ontario’s only multi-utility provider. This executive role drives operational excellence, infrastructure reliability, and strategic initiatives that strengthen communities and shape the future of integrated utilities. Learn more.

Utilities Kingston operates multiple utilities through a single service structure, allowing us to deliver cost savings and customer service excellence. We’re unique in Ontario, combining water, wastewater, gas and electrical services, and broadband fibre optics in one company.

Trusted by customers to deliver reliable utilities for more than 150 years, employees are proud to provide personal, responsive services. Learn more about Utilities Kingston or watch our
